detail.description: Jarred Kelenic homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.

Jarred Kelenic doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Starling Marte. Colson Montgomery scores. Andrew Benintendi scores. Jarred Kelenic out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Starling Marte to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to catcher Elias Díaz to third baseman Maikel Garcia.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to center fielder Lane Thomas.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Miguel Vargas scores. Andrew Benintendi to 2nd.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to second baseman Adam Frazier, deflected by shortstop Zach Neto. Andrew Benintendi to 2nd.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd on the throw, center fielder Mike Trout to second baseman Adam Frazier.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zach Neto, deflected by second baseman Adam Frazier. Andrew Benintendi to 2nd.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to second baseman Cole Young, deflected by pitcher Luis Castillo.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a fly ball to left fielder Gavin Sheets.
Jarred Kelenic doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Casey Schmitt.
Jarred Kelenic singles on a ground ball to right fielder Nick Castellanos. Colson Montgomery to 3rd.
